title: ObservabilityInputSchema
description: Schema for evaluation input test cases related to observability.

dataset_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation dataset.

query_id.description: Unique identifier for the test case query.

expected_span_operations.description: The list of expected service span operation names (e.g., hybrid_search, generate_tokens).

max_expected_latency_ms.description: The threshold for latency in ms.
